Social media operating system

Plan, review, and publish with one clear approval gate.

ElevateMindStudio is a control room for brand memory, AI-assisted drafts, human approval, and connector-safe publishing. AlgoProven is the first live campaign.

APILive WorkspaceReady PublishingHuman gate
Private beta Request access

Platform

Built for source-backed content operations.

Brand memory

Store source material, campaign notes, positioning, and approved claims before AI drafts anything.

Review workflow

Drafts move through human approval before queueing or publishing, so nothing reaches a channel by accident.

Connector readiness

Track Buffer, YouTube, LinkedIn, Discord, and future channels from one operational view.

Workflow

Review before reach.

The workspace connects source intake, Claude draft generation, review controls, Buffer dry-run validation, inbox triage, and connector readiness into one operating surface.

Open live workspace
